reason: Code violation dataset — provides distress signal (address + violation description). No owner or parcel fields. For phone enrichment, cross-reference address with county assessor parcel endpoint.
NYC DOB violation dataset — provides address + description + boro. No owner fields. Cross-reference with NYC PLUTO (Socrata parcel dataset) for owner information.
LA Code Enforcement case data — provides stno+stname+zip, violation type. No owner. Cross-reference with LA County Assessor parcel endpoint for owner.

SANDAG parcel layer — has situs_address, situs_community, situs_zip, situs_street. Reprobe ?f=pjson for OWNER_NAME, MAIL_ADDR, USE_CODE, ZONING columns. Almost certainly present in a county assessor parcel layer.
Orange County OCGIS parcel layer. Has SITE_ADDRESS. Reprobe for owner/APN/USE_CODE fields.
Riverside County Current_Parcels — SITUS_ADDRESS, SITUS_CITY_NM, SITUS_ZIP_NR present. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, APN, USE_CODE.
San Bernardino County Parcels — has SITUS_ADDRESS, SITUS_CITY, SITUS_ZIP, SITUS_NBR, SITUS_NAME. Reprobe for owner/mailing/USE_CODE fields.
Santa Clara County Parcels_Public_View — Situs_Address_Full present. Reprobe for owner/APN/use code fields.

Alameda County assessor Parcels layer — SitusAddress, SitusCity, SitusZip, SitusStreetNumber, SitusStreetName present. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, MAIL_ADDR, APN, USE_CODE. County assessor layers virtually always have owner data.
Sacramento County Parcels layer — STREET_NBR, STREET_NAM, CITY, ZIP present. Reprobe for owner/APN fields.
Contra Costa address points — fulladd, municipality, postal, sitenum, sitestreet present. Layer 8 of a MapServer. Reprobe parent MapServer for parcel layer with owner data.
Bakersfield address points — ADDRESS, CITY, ZIP, NUMBER, STREET_NAME present. Reprobe for OWNER, APN. May need Kern County assessor endpoint (not city of Bakersfield) for full parcel data.
HCAD parcels — site_str_num, site_str_name, site_city, site_zip present. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, MAIL_ADDR, STATE_CLASS, LAND_USE. HCAD layers virtually always include full ownership data.

Maricopa County Assessor — PHYSICAL_ADDRESS, PHYSICAL_CITY, PHYSICAL_ZIP, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, PHYSICAL_STREET_NUM, PHYSICAL_STREET_NAME. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR, PROPERTY_USE_CODE, ZONING. County assessor — owner data almost certainly present.
Dallas code violations — str_num, str_nam, zone, nuisance description. No owner. Cross-reference with DCAD (Dallas Central Appraisal District) parcel API for owner.
Las Vegas code enforcement — ADDRESS, DESCRIPT, LAT, LONG. No owner. Cross-reference with Clark County Assessor parcel layer.
Fort Worth code violations — Violation_Address, City, Complaint_Type_Description. No owner. Cross-reference with TAD (Tarrant Appraisal District) parcel API.
BCAD parcels — Situs address present. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR, STATE_CLASS. Bexar Appraisal District — owner data expected.
Austin code complaints — full address, description, lat/lon. No owner. Cross-reference with TCAD (Travis Central Appraisal District) parcel API.
Utah AGRC Salt Lake parcels — PARCEL_ADD, PARCEL_CITY, PARCEL_ZIP present. Reprobe for OWNER, OWNER_TYPE, LAND_USE, PROP_CLASS. AGRC data typically includes full assessor fields.
CCAD parcels — situsConcat, situsCity, situsZip, situsBldgNum, situsStreetName. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR. Collin CAD — owner data expected.
Tucson code enforcement — ADDRESSFULL, DESCRIPTION. No owner. Cross-reference with Pima County Assessor parcel layer.
Miami-Dade CCVIOL — ADDRESS, PROBLEM_DESC. No owner. Cross-reference with Miami-Dade Property Appraiser parcel API.

Broward BCPA tax roll — ADDRESS_LINE_1 (owner mailing address), CITY, ZIP. NOTE: the address column here is the OWNER's mailing address, NOT the situs address. Reprobe for SITUS_ADDRESS and LAND_USE columns. The owner name is almost certainly in this dataset.
Palm Beach County parcels — SITE_ADDR_STR, CITYNAME, ZIP1, STREET_NUMBER, STREET_NAME. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR, LAND_USE, ZONING.
Hillsborough Code Enforcement — USER_Property_Address, USER_ZIP_CODE, USER_B1_APPL_STATUS. No owner. Cross-reference with Hillsborough Property Appraiser parcel API.
Orange FL Code Enforcement — CE_COMPLETE_ADDRESS, CE_LOC_ST_NUM, CE_LOC_ST_NAME, INCI_DESC. No owner. Cross-reference with Orange County Property Appraiser.
Fulton County Tax Parcels — Address, AddrNumber, AddrStreet. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, MAIL_ADDR, LAND_USE, CLASS.
Gwinnett Address Points — FULLADDR, MUNICIPALITY, ZIP5, ADDRNUM, FULLNAME. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, LAND_USE fields. Address points may not include owner — need the tax parcel layer.
Charlotte/Mecklenburg Code Enforcement — FullAddress, CaseType, DetailedDescription. No owner. Cross-reference with Mecklenburg County property tax parcel data.
Wake County parcels — SITE_ADDRESS, CITY_DECODE, ZIPNUM, STNUM, FULL_STREET_NAME. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR, LAND_USE, PROP_CLASS. Wake County property records are comprehensive.
Honolulu LEGDAT address — merged_address, cityname, zip1, adrno, adrstr. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR, LAND_USE, ZONING.
Seattle code complaints — originaladdress1, originalcity, originalzip, recordtypedesc, description, lat/lon. No owner. Cross-reference with King County Assessor parcel API.
Philly L&I violations — ADDRESS, ZIP, VIOLATIONTYPE, VIOLATIONDESCRIPTION. No owner. Cross-reference with Philadelphia OPA (Office of Property Assessment) parcel data.
Cambridge housing code violations — full_address, code, description, lat/lon. No owner. Cross-reference with Middlesex County Registry of Deeds or city assessor.

Suffolk County tax parcels — FULLADDRESS, MUNICIPALITY, ZIPCODE, LANDUSE. Has LANDUSE (good for industrial detection). Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR. NY assessment rolls always include owner data.
Columbus code enforcement — SITE_ADDRESS, B1_PER_TYPE, B1_PER_SUB_TYPE. No owner. Cross-reference with Franklin County Auditor parcel search.
Hennepin County parcels — HOUSE_NO, STREET_NM, MUNIC_NM, ZIP_CD. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR, LAND_USE, PROP_CLASS. Minnesota county GIS data is typically comprehensive.
Oakland County parcels — SITEADDRESS, SITECITY, SITEZIP5, STRUCTURE_DESC. Has STRUCTURE_DESC (good for industrial!). Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR, ZONING.
Cleveland building complaints — PRIMARY_ADDRESS, VIOLATION_NUMBER, SOURCE, LAT, LON. No owner. Cross-reference with Cuyahoga County Fiscal Officer parcel data.
Fairfax County address points — ADDRESS_1, CITY, ZIP, STREET_NUM, FULL_NAME, ADDRESS_TYPE, PARCEL_PIN. Has PARCEL_PIN link. Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, LAND_USE in the parcel polygon layer.
Montgomery County housing code violations — street_address, city, zip_code, code_reference, condition. No owner. Cross-reference with Montgomery County property tax account data.
Indianapolis code enforcement — STREET_ADDRESS, CITY, ZIP, CASE_TYPE, CASE_STATUS. No owner. Cross-reference with Marion County Assessor parcel data.
St. Louis County parcels — PROP_ADD, MUNICIPALITY, PROP_ZIP, LUCODE. Has LUCODE (good for industrial!). Reprobe for OWNER_NAME, OWNER_MAIL_ADDR. St. Louis County assessor data is comprehensive.
